name: Premises registration certificate
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Bulawayo Health Inspectorate's annually renewed certificate expressly covering hotels, boarding houses, lodging houses and food premises.

name: Liquor licence
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Licence from the national Liquor Licensing Board required to sell liquor.

name: Folio
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The running guest account to which room, food and extras are posted until settlement.

name: RevPAR / ADR
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Revenue per available room and average daily rate; core accommodation performance measures.

name: Cover
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: One guest served in a meal period; the unit of restaurant volume.

name: Agent voucher
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A tour agent's authorisation to bill services to the agent's account.

name: Rack rate
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The published full room rate before discounts or agent terms.

name: Service charge
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: An added percentage distributed to staff under house policy; treatment should be configured, not assumed.
